text:
Backs in the Distance is the 22nd episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Cards

 
Title22.png|Title Card
eyecatch22-1.png|Eyecatch #1
eyecatch22-2.png|Eyecatch #2
 

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 46: The Distant Image of Their Backs, Chapter 47: A Girl in the Grip of Battles Past and Present, Chapter 60: In the Absence of God and Chapter 61: The Hero of Ishval.
The transmutation array which appears in the background of this episode's title card is the deconstruction half of the Dragon's Pulse tattoo on Scar's right arm.
This is the first time Scar has shown regret for a murder he's committed.
In an ironic twist, Scar ended up being in exactly the same position as Kimblee; he was trying to use alchemy to kill someone who was shielding someone important to them.
